elements.original_description: A small pile of coins on a white background, symbolizing minimal investment
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a small, neat pile of coins on a pure white background, symbolizing minimal investment. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, sharp lines, no shading or gradients. Isolated on a stark white background with even studio lighting.

elements.original_description: A person standing still on a white background, representing stagnation
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person standing perfectly still on a pure white background, representing stagnation and inaction. Cinematic lighting with soft, even tones, full body shot with sharp focus on the subject. High resolution, professional studio environment, neutral expression, conveying a sense of being stuck.
